Hi, I'm Mark. People often ask me how I really feel about working from home, so let me share my point of view. Honestly, I think it depends on the person. In my opinion, working from home is great for focus, because there are fewer interruptions. But I have to admit it can feel a little lonely. Some of my colleagues totally disagree with me. They say the office is better for teamwork and new ideas. Actually, I understand their point of view, and I partly agree. So my honest opinion is simple: the best option is a mix of both. A few days at home and a few days at the office. That way, you get focus and friendship at the same time.

Hello, my name is Anna. Today I want to talk about something many people argue about: social media. In my opinion, social media is neither good nor bad on its own. Honestly, I think it depends on how you use it. When I use it to stay in touch with old friends, I totally love it. But when I spend hours just scrolling, I disagree with myself the next morning, because I feel I wasted my time. My point of view is that we need balance. I don't completely agree with people who say we should delete every app, and I don't agree with those who are online all day either. Actually, the truth is usually somewhere in the middle.

Sandra shares her opinion about a new idea. First, she introduces her topic. Then she gives her honest opinion clearly. After that, she explains the reason behind her opinion. Next, she says that her view depends on the situation. Finally, she invites the other person to agree or disagree.
